title: Phenol-Chloroform Extraction for dsRNA Purification
author: Cera Fisher
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4pmgvk6
materials: Move aqueous phase (top) to new tube

steps.title: Add 166
steps.instruction: Add 166.6 uL of nuclease free water to each PCR tube. Move 187 uL of liquid to new, labeled 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 200 uL of acid phenol/chloroform (50:50) to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 200 uL of acid phenol/chloroform (50:50) to each tube. Shake vigorously for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4C for 5 minutes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4C for 5 minutes at 12,000 * g or greater

steps.title: Move aqueous phase (top) to new tube (about 200 uL)
steps.instruction: Move aqueous phase (top) to new tube (about 200 uL).

steps.title: Add an equal volume chloroform to the aqueous phase
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume chloroform to the aqueous phase. Shake vigorously for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4C for 5 minutes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4C for 5 minutes at 12,000 * g or greater

steps.title: Add an equal volume of isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of isopropanol.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes

steps.title: To pellet
steps.instruction: To pellet: Spin at 4C for 20 minutes at 12,000 * g or greater

steps.title: Remove isopropanol and Wash pellet with...
steps.instruction: Remove isopropanol and Wash pellet with 75% ethanol in nuclease free water

steps.title: Spin at 4C for 5 minutes at 7,500 * g
steps.instruction: Spin at 4C for 5 minutes at 7,500 * g

steps.title: Remove all ethanol from pellet and...
steps.instruction: Remove all ethanol from pellet and let air dry (for about 15 minutes)

steps.title: Resuspend dried pellet in 50 uL of nuclease free water
steps.instruction: Resuspend dried pellet in 50 uL of nuclease free water.

steps.title: Heat resuspended dsRNA to between 65...
steps.instruction: Heat resuspended dsRNA to between 65 and 80 degrees C for 5 minutes

steps.title: Allow to cool at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Allow to cool at room temperature for 10 minutes

steps.title: Add 13
steps.instruction: Add 13.33 uL of ammonium acetate to each tube.
